With revenues of approximately ₹45,000 crore and a market capitalization of ₹1,98,000 crore (USD 23 billion), the Group has a significant presence in pharmaceutical, power, and city gas distribution (CGD) sectors. Torrent Power is a prominent player in India’s energy sector, with expertise in generation, transmission, and distribution. It operates a capacity of 4,881 MWp, including 786.5 MW from renewable sources, and distributes over 31 billion units annually across 12 cities, serving 4.21 million customers. Torrent Gas, the Group's CGD arm, is authorized to develop City gas infrastructure across 34 districts in 7 states and 1 Union Territory. It operates 500+ CNG stations and provides over 2,00,000 domestic PNG connections and 1300+ Industrial & Commercial PNG connections. With 2,000+ mobility stations across India, we bring you premium additivised fuel, fast EV charging, CNG filling, nitrogen tyre inflation, doorstep diesel delivery, and Wild Bean Cafe — all under one roof. Additivised Fuel Power your drive with additivised fuel specially formulated with ACTIVE technology. It actively cleans critical engine parts and optimizes the average cost of diesel and petrol consumption over time. Fuel Retail Instantly find an open fuel pump near me or a 24-hour petrol pump near me through our fuel station locator. Our stations provide comprehensive fuel station services, including professional oil change services. Jio-bp pulse India's growing network of EV charging stations.
